name: Thunderbird
description: Free and open-source email, calendar, and contacts client by Mozilla

release_date.note: Release notes page contains 'Release Date: Month DD, YYYY'. Not in product-details JSON.

notes: In-app updates use Balrog: aus.thunderbird.net/json/1/Thunderbird/{VERSION}/{BUILDID}/... — requires valid BUILDID. macOS targets: Darwin_x86_64-gcc3-u-i386-x86_64 (Intel), Darwin_aarch64-gcc3 (Apple Silicon). All-locales listing: thunderbird.net/en-US/thunderbird/all/. Also available: LATEST_THUNDERBIRD_DEVEL_VERSION, LATEST_THUNDERBIRD_NIGHTLY_VERSION.
